title: Pael's Legion
description: Doubles [gold]Block[/gold] gained from a card, then goes to sleep for [blue]2[/blue] turns.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic summons a pet that participates in combat. When you play a card that gains Block, this relic doubles the Block gained from that specific card. After the doubling effect triggers, the relic enters a sleep state lasting 2 turns, during which the block doubling is disabled. The relic counter displays the number of turns remaining in the cooldown.
